title: taraxacum vetteri
intro: Taraxacum vetteri, commonly known as the lesser dandelion or Vetter's dandelion, is a plant species in the dandelion genus, Taraxacum. It is a perennial plant that has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds that have been shown to have potential health benefits. The health benefits of Taraxacum vetteri include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as teas and infusions, can be made by steeping the leaves and roots in hot water.
